title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 348.438 - Departments to provide assistance
text:
348.438.  Departments to provide assistance. — The department of natural resources, the department of economic development and the department of agriculture may provide to an eligible new generation cooperative any technical support necessary to assist in the operation of the facility or the marketing of its products.
(L. 1999 H.B. 888 § 5) 
Effective 7-02-99
